summary: Tested new 'Défi Famille' feature end-to-end (backend + frontend). Added 13 new pytest cases covering POST /api/challenges (auth, 402 for free, 200 for premium, category 404, num_questions 422 validation), GET /api/challenges/{token} public anti-cheat (correct_index and explanation absent), POST /api/challenges/{token}/participate (public, score calc, detail, leaderboard, length mismatch 400, unknown 404, perfect-score path), and GET /api/challenges/mine (auth, sorted desc, no correct_index leakage). All 38 backend tests pass (25 prior + 13 new = 100%). Frontend: admin can navigate via nav-challenges → /app/challenges → challenges-new-btn → /app/challenges/new, select chansons + num=5 (server caps at 4 since pool=4), submit redirects to /app/challenges/{token}. Detail page shows invite URL https://caricature-saas.preview.emergentagent.com/defi/{token}, WhatsApp (wa.me), SMS (sms:), Email (mailto:) hrefs all contain the token, copy button + leaderboard render. Public play at /defi/{token} works for fully logged-out users (cookies cleared): name input gates start button, 4 questions navigated with play-option-0/play-next-btn, score screen shows 4 play-detail-i and play-leaderboard containing the new participant. Free user gating verified: /app/challenges shows challenges-locked + challenges-upgrade-cta, /app/challenges/new displays 'Réservé aux Premium' screen with no submit button.

issues: Page still issues GET /api/challenges/mine for free users → 401 console error before the Premium-gate banner renders. Cosmetic only; suggest skipping the fetch when user.plan !== 'premium'.

action_items: (Optional) Skip the /api/challenges/mine fetch in Challenges.jsx when current user is non-premium to eliminate the 401 console noise.
(Optional) On ChallengeNew, when selected category pool < chosen num_questions, surface a hint such as 'Cette catégorie ne contient que N questions' before submit (currently server silently caps).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~620 lines with the new challenges block. Before next feature, split into routers/ (auth, quiz, payments, challenges) and move seed_data side-effects out of startup() for testability.
ChallengeCreate validates 3 ≤ num_questions ≤ 10 but the server then silently caps at pool size. Acceptable, but consider returning a warning/info field when capped so the UI can communicate it.
_public_challenge() correctly excludes both correct_index and explanation, and /challenges/mine uses a Mongo projection to do the same — anti-cheat is enforced at two layers. Good.
Detail page polls leaderboard every 5s via setInterval — fine; ensure cleanup on unmount (already done in code). No issue observed.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@quizdantan.fr / Admin2026! (premium). Free users registered dynamically (qa.free.{ts}@quizdantan.fr / test1234).
seed_data_creation: Server auto-seeds 6 categories and 24 questions on startup. Tests create fresh challenges per run; old ones (token 'tQ2qhcssjmc') remain in DB and visible in /api/challenges/mine when logged in as admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py now include TestChallenges. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Note: TestChallenges.test_create_admin_premium stores the created token on pytest.shared_token for downstream tests; keep the class order intact. chansons category pool = 4 questions in seed, so num_questions=5 will return 4. To test num_questions>4 working, use a category with ≥10 seeded questions (currently all 6 cats have 4 each). Front-end public play page is at /defi/{token} (no /app prefix) and works fully logged-out.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in the Défi Famille feature.
